task_completion.description: Open the chinook.odb database in LibreOffice Base.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Base application window is open, and the title bar or main window indicates 'chinook.odb' is the active database.

task_completion.description: Create the 'InvoiceArchive' table with the specified schema.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'InvoiceArchive' table is visible in the Tables list of the main Base window, or there is a screenshot showing a successful SQL 'CREATE TABLE InvoiceArchive...' execution in the SQL tool.

task_completion.description: Create the 'InvoiceLineArchive' table with the specified schema.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'InvoiceLineArchive' table is visible in the Tables list of the main Base window, or there is a screenshot showing a successful SQL 'CREATE TABLE InvoiceLineArchive...' execution in the SQL tool.

task_completion.description: Execute logic to transfer 2009 invoices and line items to the archive tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Base 'Execute SQL Statement' window shows an INSERT query filtering for the year 2009 (e.g., YEAR(InvoiceDate) = 2009 or LIKE '%2009%'). Note: It is expected to affect 0 rows due to the actual database contents.

task_completion.description: Execute logic to delete the original 2009 records from the 'Invoice' and 'InvoiceLine' tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Base 'Execute SQL Statement' window shows a DELETE query targeting the year 2009 for the original tables. Note: It is expected to affect 0 rows.

integrity.description: The agent used LibreOffice Base to perform the database operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Base GUI being used, rather than terminal commands attempting to modify the .odb file directly or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not artificially create 2009 records to satisfy the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no SQL INSERT statements adding fake 2009 invoices to the original tables before archiving.

integrity.description: SQL commands were actually executed in the database engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: SQL commands appear in the 'Tools -> SQL' execution window of LibreOffice Base with a status message indicating successful execution (even if 0 rows are modified), rather than just being typed into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRITICAL: The provided 'chinook.odb' database contains invoice dates from 2021 to 2025. There are ZERO invoices from the year 2009. The agent will not find any data to archive. The task is considered successfully completed if the agent creates the correct tables and executes the correct transfer/delete logic (SQL queries) for the year 2009, even though 0 rows will be affected. Do not penalize the agent for transferring or deleting 0 records.
